patch_title: Patch 7.45 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

changes: Void Reaping: Melee Mastery III potency increased from 540 to 560; Enhanced Void Reaping potency increased from 600 to 620.
Cross Reaping: Melee Mastery III potency increased from 540 to 560; Enhanced Cross Reaping potency increased from 600 to 620.
Grim Reaping: Potency increased from 200 to 220.

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: A variant dungeon where players explore branching paths and boss fights.
new_content.npc_location: Shallow Moor at Old Sharlayan (X:12.0, Y:13.3)

new_content.name: The Merchant's Tale (Advanced)
new_content.description: A free-form series of battles against stronger iterations of the bosses from The Merchant's Tale.

new_content.name: Another Merchant's Tale
new_content.description: A challenging four-player criterion dungeon with restricted variant actions.

new_content.name: A Need for Speed
new_content.description: New quest for Inconceivably Further Hildibrand Adventures.
